brief_notes: Sex-specific cortical/food restriction paper. Key numbers verified: 15% weight loss, 40% greater female restriction, 39% vs 27% ad lib reduction, leptin -72% males vs -28% females (6.45 vs 1.84; 3.94 vs 2.83 ng/mL), AMPK 2.9x vs 1.4x, 24% vs 12% ATP FRET decrease, FRET t1/2 8.48 vs 10.51 min males, 8.66 vs 9.66 min females, sample sizes (17/19 males, 23/11 females), 7-9 weeks old, brain 2% body mass / 20% caloric. 4 figures, 3 tables.
